edge_reports.test_title: Switch to map view for search results
edge_reports.description: Validate that a user can switch between map and list views for all search options
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in cuisine field: 'Italian'
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with no filters applied
Step 4: Verify map view displays all Italian restaurants within a 5km radius
Step 5: Confirm list view displays same results as map view
edge_reports.expected_result: Map view correctly displays all Italian restaurants within a 5km radius, with accurate distance and rating information

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid search filter for map view
edge_reports.description: Validate that an invalid search filter does not affect the map view
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'invalid' in cuisine field: 'invalid'
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with invalid filter applied
Step 4: Verify map view displays no results or an error message
Step 5: Confirm list view also displays no results or an error message
edge_reports.expected_result: Map view correctly handles invalid search filter, displaying no results or an error message, and not affecting the map view

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum number of search results for map view
edge_reports.description: Validate that the maximum number of search results is displayed correctly in the map view
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in cuisine field: 'Italian'
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with maximum results filter applied (100)
Step 4: Verify map view displays exactly 100 Italian restaurants within a 5km radius
Step 5: Confirm list view also displays exactly 100 results
edge_reports.expected_result: Map view correctly displays the maximum number of search results (100) for Italian restaurants within a 5km radius, with accurate distance and rating information

edge_reports.test_title: Search result integration with other features
edge_reports.description: Validate that the search results are correctly integrated with other features, such as filtering and sorting
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in cuisine field: 'Italian'
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with no filters applied
Step 4: Verify search results are correctly sorted by distance and rating
Step 5: Confirm filtering options (price, distance) work correctly for search results
edge_reports.expected_result: Search results are correctly integrated with other features, such as filtering and sorting, displaying accurate information and allowing correct interactions

edge_reports.test_title: Download mobile application from App Store
edge_reports.description: Validate successful download of mobile application from Apple App Store
preconditions: User has an iOS device with sufficient storage space
test_steps: Step 1: Open Apple App Store on the mobile device
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' and select the app icon
Step 3: Tap the 'Get' button, then tap 'Install'
Step 4: Wait for the installation to complete, then verify the app is installed
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile application is successfully downloaded and installed on the iOS device

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid App Store download
edge_reports.description: Validate error handling for invalid App Store download
preconditions: User has an iOS device with insufficient storage space
test_steps: Step 1: Open Apple App Store on the mobile device
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' and select the app icon
Step 3: Tap the 'Get' button, then tap 'Install'
Step 4: Verify an error message is displayed indicating insufficient storage space
edge_reports.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the device does not have sufficient storage space for installation

edge_reports.test_title: Minimum storage space for download
edge_reports.description: Validate successful download with minimum storage space
preconditions: User has an iOS device with exactly 100 MB of available storage space
test_steps: Step 1: Open Apple App Store on the mobile device
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' and select the app icon
Step 3: Tap the 'Get' button, then tap 'Install'
Step 4: Verify the application is installed successfully
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile application is successfully downloaded and installed on the iOS device with exactly 100 MB of available storage space

edge_reports.test_title: Download mobile application from Google Play Store
edge_reports.description: Validate successful download of mobile application from Google Play Store
preconditions: User has an Android device with sufficient storage space
test_steps: Step 1: Open Google Play Store on the mobile device
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' and select the app icon
Step 3: Tap the 'Install' button
Step 4: Verify the application is installed successfully
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile application is successfully downloaded and installed on the Android device

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting information link for restaurant with menu and details
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the information link directs to a page with restaurant details and menu
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to mobile application home screen
Step 2: Tap on 'Information' link for a specific restaurant
Step 3: Verify that the information page displays restaurant name, address, phone number, email, type of food, average price, and menu with dish names, descriptions, and prices
Step 4: Confirm that the menu is displayed in a scrollable list format
edge_reports.expected_result: The information page displays restaurant details and menu with dish names, descriptions, and prices, and the user can scroll through the menu list

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid restaurant ID returns error message
edge_reports.description: Validate that attempting to access an invalid restaurant information link returns an error message
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to mobile application home screen
Step 2: Tap on 'Information' link for a non-existent or invalid restaurant ID
Step 3: Verify that the information page displays an error message indicating the restaurant not found
Step 4: Confirm that the user is redirected back to the home screen
edge_reports.expected_result: The information page displays an error message 'Restaurant not found' and the user is redirected back to the home screen

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum number of menu items displayed
edge_reports.description: Validate that the maximum number of menu items is displayed on the information page
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to mobile application home screen
Step 2: Tap on 'Information' link for a specific restaurant with a large menu
Step 3: Verify that the information page displays the maximum number of menu items (100) and allows scrolling
Step 4: Confirm that the user can scroll through the entire menu list
edge_reports.expected_result: The information page displays the maximum number of menu items (100) and allows scrolling, with the user able to view all menu items

edge_reports.test_title: Information link integration with search results
edge_reports.description: Validate that the information link is displayed correctly in search results and directs to the correct page
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to mobile application home screen
Step 2: Search for a specific restaurant using the search bar
Step 3: Verify that the information link for the searched restaurant is displayed in the search results list
Step 4: Tap on the information link and verify that it directs to the correct page with restaurant details and menu
edge_reports.expected_result: The information link for the searched restaurant is displayed correctly in search results and directs to the correct page with restaurant details and menu

edge_reports.test_title: Download mobile application successfully
edge_reports.description: Validate that the mobile application can be downloaded without any issues.
preconditions: The user has a compatible device and internet connection
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the App Store (for iOS) or Google Play Store (for Android)
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' in the search bar
Step 3: Click on the 'Get' button (for iOS) or 'Install' button (for Android)
Step 4: Verify that the download is successful and the app icon appears on the device's home screen
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile application is successfully downloaded and installed on the device, with no errors or warnings.

edge_reports.test_title: Error handling for invalid download attempt
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system handles an invalid download attempt correctly.
preconditions: The user has a compatible device and internet connection
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the App Store (for iOS) or Google Play Store (for Android)
Step 2: Search for 'InvalidApp' in the search bar
Step 3: Click on the 'Get' button (for iOS) or 'Install' button (for Android)
Step 4: Verify that an error message is displayed indicating that the app cannot be found
edge_reports.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the app cannot be found, with no attempt to download the invalid app.

edge_reports.test_title: Download mobile application at edge case
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system handles an edge case for downloading the mobile application correctly.
preconditions: The user has a compatible device and internet connection
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the App Store (for iOS) or Google Play Store (for Android)
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' in the search bar
Step 3: Click on the 'Get' button (for iOS) or 'Install' button (for Android) while the device is running low on storage space
Step 4: Verify that an error message is displayed indicating that there is not enough storage space to download the app
edge_reports.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that there is not enough storage space to download the app, with no attempt to download the app.

edge_reports.test_title: Integration test for mobile application download
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system integrates correctly with other features.
preconditions: The user has a compatible device and internet connection
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the App Store (for iOS) or Google Play Store (for Android)
Step 2: Search for 'Restaurant Finder' in the search bar
Step 3: Click on the 'Get' button (for iOS) or 'Install' button (for Android) and wait for the download to complete
Step 4: Verify that the app icon appears on the device's home screen and can be launched successfully
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile application is successfully downloaded, installed, and launched on the device, with no errors or warnings.

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting information link on result item
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the information link on a result item redirects to the correct page with expected data
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search results page at /search
Step 2: Select the first result item with price $15.99 and distance 0.5 km
Step 3: Click the 'Information' link on the selected result item
Step 4: Verify redirect to information page at /info/restaurant-id with expected data (name, address, rating, etc.)
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully redirected to restaurant information page with correct data and no errors

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid link selection on result item
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting an invalid link (e.g. non-existent ID) on a result item returns an error page
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search results page at /search
Step 2: Select the first result item with price $15.99 and distance 0.5 km
Step 3: Click an invalid 'Information' link (e.g. non-existent ID) on the selected result item
Step 4: Verify redirect to error page at /error with expected error message
edge_reports.expected_result: User redirected to error page with correct error message and no data displayed

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting information link on last result item
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the 'Information' link on the last result item still works correctly
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search results page at /search
Step 2: Select the last result item with price $15.99 and distance 0.5 km
Step 3: Click the 'Information' link on the selected result item
Step 4: Verify redirect to information page at /info/restaurant-id with expected data
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully redirected to restaurant information page with correct data and no errors

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting information link from search results page
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the 'Information' link on the search results page redirects to the correct page with expected data
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search results page at /search
Step 2: Enter search query 'Italian food'
Step 3: Click the first result item with price $15.99 and distance 0.5 km
Step 4: Click the 'Information' link on the selected result item
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully redirected to restaurant information page with correct data and no errors

edge_reports.test_title: Search by price with invalid range
edge_reports.description: Validate error handling for an invalid price range
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to Search page at /search
Step 2: Enter minimum price '-10' and maximum price '500' in the price range fields
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with invalid price range (-10-500)
Step 4: Verify an error message is displayed indicating an invalid price range
Step 5: Confirm search results are not displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: User receives an error message indicating an invalid price range (-10-500) and no search results are displayed

edge_reports.test_title: Search by destination with invalid distance range
edge_reports.description: Validate error handling when entering an invalid minimum or maximum distance range.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the search page at /search
Step 2: Enter minimum distance: '-5' and maximum distance: '10' in the distance fields
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with destination: 'New York'
Step 4: Verify error message is displayed indicating invalid distance range
edge_reports.expected_result: Error message displays an alert indicating that the minimum distance cannot be negative, and results are not displayed

edge_reports.test_title: Search by destination integration with map feature
edge_reports.description: Validate search functionality integrates correctly with the map feature.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the search page at /search
Step 2: Enter minimum distance: '5' and maximum distance: '10' in the distance fields
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with destination: 'New York'
Step 4: Verify map feature displays restaurants within the specified distance range (5-10 km)
edge_reports.expected_result: Map feature correctly displays a list of restaurants within the specified distance range (5-10 km) with exact distances and addresses

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid minimum distance input for search by destination
edge_reports.description: Validate error handling when entering invalid minimum distance
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to Search page at /search
Step 2: Enter destination 'New York' in search field
Step 3: Enter invalid minimum distance '-5' in distance range field
Step 4: Click 'Search' button
Step 5: Verify error message is displayed indicating invalid input
edge_reports.expected_result: User receives an error message when attempting to search with an invalid minimum distance (-5 km), preventing the search from being executed

edge_reports.test_title: Search by destination integration with restaurant list
edge_reports.description: Validate search functionality integrates with restaurant list
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to Search page at /search
Step 2: Enter destination 'New York' in search field
Step 3: Click 'Search' button
Step 4: Verify restaurant list displays filtered results for New York
Step 5: Confirm maximum 10 restaurants are displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully searches for restaurants in New York, displaying a list of up to 10 results that integrates with the restaurant list feature

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid integer input for price search

Step 2: Enter 'price' in search field and select 'abc-500' from dropdown

edge_reports.test_title: Valid price and destination search with accepted input

Step 2: Enter price range 100-500 in 'Price' field
Step 3: Select 'Restaurant' as the destination type
Step 4: Click 'Search' button with expected result of displaying restaurants within the specified price range and distance

edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays a list of restaurants within the specified price range and distance, sorted by distance first, then by price

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid price input for price and destination search

Step 3: Select 'Restaurant' as the destination type
Step 4: Click 'Search' button with expected result of displaying an error message indicating invalid input
Step 5: Verify that the search results are not displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating invalid input and does not display any search results

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum price range for price and destination search

Step 3: Select 'Restaurant' as the destination type
Step 4: Click 'Search' button with expected result of displaying restaurants within the specified maximum price range and distance

edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays a list of restaurants within the specified maximum price range and distance, sorted by distance first, then by price

edge_reports.test_title: Integration with restaurant details page

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum 100 results: 'All' restaurant type

edge_reports.test_title: Search by restaurant type: Integration with other features

edge_reports.test_title: Search for specific dish by name

edge_reports.test_title: Sort results by price

edge_reports.test_title: New release notification for restaurant owners
edge_reports.description: Validate that new releases are properly notified to restaurant owners
test_steps: Step 1: Log in as a restaurant owner at /login with username 'owner@example.com' and password 'SecurePass123'
Step 2: Navigate to the dashboard at /dashboard
Step 3: Verify that the new release notification is displayed with exact title 'New Release Available: Version 2.1'

test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to Administrator settings page at /admin/settings
Step 2: Click 'Preferred Language' dropdown menu and select 'Invalid Language'
Step 3: Verify that an error message is displayed indicating that the preferred language is invalid
Step 4: Confirm that the administrator's preferred language remains unchanged
edge_reports.expected_result: The administrator cannot select an invalid preferred language, and an error message is displayed indicating that the selection is not valid, with no changes to their preferred language

edge_reports.test_title: Administrator selects Spanish as preferred language on web-portal (edge case)
edge_reports.description: Validate that administrator can select Spanish as their preferred language and it is displayed correctly in edge cases
preconditions: Administrator has logged in to the web-portal
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to Administrator settings page at /admin/settings
Step 2: Click 'Preferred Language' dropdown menu and select 'Spanish'
Step 3: Verify that the preferred language is updated to Spanish on the profile page at /admin/profile
Step 4: Confirm that all subsequent pages are displayed in Spanish, including edge cases such as sorting or filtering
edge_reports.expected_result: The administrator's preferred language is successfully updated to Spanish and all subsequent pages are displayed in Spanish, including edge cases, with no errors or warnings

edge_reports.test_title: Administrator selects preferred language on web-portal (integration test)
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting a preferred language affects subsequent pages and features correctly
preconditions: Administrator has logged in to the web-portal
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to Administrator settings page at /admin/settings
Step 2: Click 'Preferred Language' dropdown menu and select 'Spanish'
Step 3: Verify that subsequent pages, including search results and filters, are displayed in Spanish
Step 4: Confirm that the administrator's preferred language affects other features correctly, such as sorting or displaying maximum results
edge_reports.expected_result: The administrator's preferred language is successfully updated and affects all subsequent pages and features correctly, including search results, filters, and other features, with no errors or warnings

edge_reports.test_title: User logs in successfully with valid credentials
edge_reports.description: Validate user log-in functionality with valid username and password
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to login page at /login
Step 2: Enter username 'testuser@example.com' in email field
Step 3: Enter password 'SecurePass123' in password field
Step 4: Click 'Login' button
Step 5: Verify redirect to dashboard at /dashboard
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully logged in and redirected to dashboard with JWT token in response header

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid password prevents user log-in

Step 3: Enter password 'InvalidPass123' in password field
Step 4: Click 'Login' button
Step 5: Verify error message 'Incorrect password' is displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: Error message 'Incorrect password' is displayed, log-in attempt fails

edge_reports.test_title: User logs in with empty password

Step 2: Enter username 'testuser@example.com' in email field
Step 3: Leave password field blank
Step 4: Click 'Login' button
Step 5: Verify error message 'Password is required' is displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: Error message 'Password is required' is displayed, log-in attempt fails

edge_reports.description: Validate seamless transition from user registration to log-in functionality

Step 2: Fill out registration form with valid data
Step 3: Submit registration form and verify successful registration
Step 4: Navigate back to login page at /login
Step 5: Enter username and password from previous step and verify successful log-in
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully logs in after completing registration process

edge_reports.test_title: User logs in successfully and is automatically logged in on subsequent visits
edge_reports.description: Validate that user can log in with correct credentials and be automatically logged in on subsequent visits without needing to re-enter credentials
preconditions: Device storage allows for login persistence
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /login page
Step 2: Enter username 'john.doe@example.com' in email field
Step 3: Enter password 'SecurePass123' in password field
Step 4: Click 'Login' button and verify redirect to dashboard at /dashboard
Step 5: Close app, reopen it, and verify user is automatically logged in without needing to re-enter credentials
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully logs in and is automatically logged in on subsequent visits without needing to re-enter credentials, with JWT token present in Authorization header

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid login credentials result in error message and no automatic log-in

preconditions: Device storage allows for login persistence

Step 2: Enter username 'invaliduser@example.com' in email field
Step 3: Enter password 'wrongpassword' in password field
Step 4: Click 'Login' button and verify error message displayed
Step 5: Close app, reopen it, and verify user is not automatically logged in
edge_reports.expected_result: User cannot log in with incorrect credentials and is not automatically logged in on subsequent visits, with error message displayed and no JWT token present in Authorization header

edge_reports.test_title: User log-in with empty password field results in error message and no automatic log-in

edge_reports.test_title: User log-in integrates with restaurant search feature

edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile phone's GPS-navigation program is not launched and displays an error message indicating that the selected restaurant exceeds the maximum allowed distance.

edge_reports.expected_result: The application displays an error message 'Invalid test environment' when an invalid test environment is set up, and the error persists until a valid test environment is set up.

edge_reports.test_title: Test edge case for maximum search results
edge_reports.description: Validate that the application handles the edge case where the maximum number of search results is reached.
preconditions: The application has been deployed in a test environment
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the 'Restaurant Search' section and enter a valid search query
Step 2: Verify that the search results are displayed with a maximum of 100 restaurants
Step 3: Click on the 'Load more' button until the maximum number of search results is reached (e.g., 200)
Step 4: Confirm that no additional search results are displayed and an error message is shown
edge_reports.expected_result: The application displays a maximum of 100 search results, and when the maximum is reached, an error message is displayed indicating that there are no more results to display.

edge_reports.test_title: Test integration with other features (e.g., order management)
edge_reports.description: Validate that the application integrates correctly with other features, such as order management.
preconditions: The application has been deployed in a test environment
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the 'Order Management' section and create a new order
Step 2: Verify that the order is successfully created and displayed in the order list
Step 3: Navigate to the 'Restaurant Search' section and search for a restaurant
Step 4: Confirm that the searched restaurant is available for ordering and can be added to the order
edge_reports.expected_result: The application integrates correctly with other features, such as order management, allowing users to create orders and add restaurants to their order lists.

edge_reports.test_title: GPS Connection Successful
edge_reports.description: Validate GPS connection establishment
preconditions: Device has a valid GPS configuration
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to GPS settings page at /gps/settings
Step 2: Verify GPS device is connected and enabled
Step 3: Confirm GPS signal strength is above minimum threshold (10%)
Step 4: Verify GPS location data is displayed correctly on the map
edge_reports.expected_result: GPS connection established successfully, device status indicates 'Connected' and location data is updated in real-time

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid GPS Connection
edge_reports.description: Test error handling for invalid GPS connection
preconditions: Device has no valid GPS configuration
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to GPS settings page at /gps/settings
Step 2: Verify GPS device is disconnected or disabled
Step 3: Confirm GPS signal strength is below minimum threshold (0%)
Step 4: Verify error message 'GPS connection failed' is displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: Error message 'GPS connection failed' is displayed, and no location data is updated

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum GPS Results
edge_reports.description: Validate maximum GPS results display
preconditions: Device has a valid GPS configuration
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to GPS settings page at /gps/settings
Step 2: Verify GPS device is connected and enabled
Step 3: Confirm GPS signal strength is above minimum threshold (10%)
Step 4: Verify maximum 100 GPS results are displayed correctly
edge_reports.expected_result: Maximum 100 GPS results are displayed, with accurate location data and signal strength indicators

edge_reports.test_title: GPS Connection with Restaurant Search
edge_reports.description: Validate GPS connection integration with restaurant search feature
preconditions: Device has a valid GPS configuration
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /restaurants/search
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in the cuisine field and click 'Search'
Step 3: Verify top 10 results are displayed with accurate location data and distance indicators
Step 4: Confirm GPS signal strength is above minimum threshold (10%)
edge_reports.expected_result: Top 10 restaurant search results are displayed with accurate location data, distance indicators, and GPS signal strength above minimum threshold

edge_reports.test_title: User-friendly list view with results sorted by distance and price
edge_reports.description: Validate that the list view displays user-friendly information about restaurants, sorted by distance and then by price.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list view at /restaurants
Step 2: Verify 'Distance' column is displayed first, followed by 'Price'
Step 3: Confirm maximum 100 restaurants are displayed in the list
Step 4: Verify each restaurant listing includes 'Name', 'Rating', and 'Price' information
edge_reports.expected_result: The list view displays user-friendly information about up to 100 restaurants, sorted by distance first, then by price, with each listing including name, rating, and price.

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid distance input results in error message
edge_reports.description: Validate that an invalid distance input triggers an error message.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list view at /restaurants
Step 2: Enter 'invalid_distance' in the distance filter field
Step 3: Click the 'Apply' button
Step 4: Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid input
edge_reports.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the distance input is invalid, and the list view remains unchanged.

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum 100 results displayed in list view
edge_reports.description: Validate that the maximum number of results (100) is displayed in the list view.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list view at /restaurants
Step 2: Verify the 'Distance' column is displayed first, followed by 'Price'
Step 3: Confirm exactly 100 restaurants are displayed in the list
Step 4: Verify no more than 100 restaurants are displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: The list view displays exactly 100 restaurant listings, with each listing including name, rating, and price information.

edge_reports.test_title: Restaurant list view integration with search feature
edge_reports.description: Validate that the restaurant list view integrates correctly with the search feature.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list view at /restaurants
Step 2: Enter 'search_term' in the search field
Step 3: Click the 'Search' button
Step 4: Verify the list view displays results matching the search term
edge_reports.expected_result: The restaurant list view correctly integrates with the search feature, displaying a filtered list of restaurants matching the search term.

edge_reports.test_title: Single-click selection in list view
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting an element in the result list only takes one click.
preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the restaurant list
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the restaurant list page at /restaurants
Step 2: Scroll down to the 5th restaurant in the list with a price range of $10-$20
Step 3: Click on the 'Select' button for that restaurant
Step 4: Verify the selected restaurant is highlighted and displayed at the top of the list
edge_reports.expected_result: The selected restaurant is highlighted and displayed at the top of the list, with a single click.

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid selection in list view
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting an invalid element in the result list results in an error.
preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the restaurant list
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the restaurant list page at /restaurants
Step 2: Scroll down to a non-existent restaurant ID (e.g. 999)
Step 3: Click on the 'Select' button for that non-existent restaurant
Step 4: Verify an error message is displayed indicating the selection was invalid
edge_reports.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the selection was invalid, with a specific error code (e.g. 'Restaurant not found').

edge_reports.test_title: Maximum results in list view
edge_reports.description: Validate that the maximum number of results is displayed when selecting an element.
preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the restaurant list
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the restaurant list page at /restaurants
Step 2: Scroll down to the last restaurant in the list with a price range of $10-$20
Step 3: Click on the 'Select' button for that restaurant
Step 4: Verify the maximum number of results (e.g. 100) is displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: The maximum number of results (e.g. 100) is displayed, with all relevant information for each restaurant.

edge_reports.test_title: Integration with search feature
edge_reports.description: Validate that the selection in the list view is integrated with the search feature.
preconditions: User has searched for a specific restaurant type (e.g. Italian)
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' as the search query and click the 'Search' button
Step 3: Scroll down to the selected restaurant in the list view
Step 4: Click on the 'Select' button for that restaurant
edge_reports.expected_result: The selected restaurant is highlighted and displayed at the top of the list, with a single click, and the search query is preserved.

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting a pin on the map takes one click
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting a pin on the map view only requires one click
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to map view at /map
Step 2: Click on a random restaurant pin
Step 3: Verify the selected pin highlights with a single click
Step 4: Confirm no additional clicks are required to select the pin
edge_reports.expected_result: The selected pin is highlighted immediately without requiring multiple clicks

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid click on map does not select a pin
edge_reports.description: Validate that an invalid click on the map view does not select a pin
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to map view at /map
Step 2: Click outside of any pins or boundaries
Step 3: Verify no pin is selected
Step 4: Confirm the map view remains unchanged
edge_reports.expected_result: No pin is selected when clicking outside of a pin or boundary on the map view

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting multiple pins on the map
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting multiple pins on the map view works correctly
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to map view at /map
Step 2: Click on a random restaurant pin
Step 3: Click on another random restaurant pin
Step 4: Verify both pins are highlighted
edge_reports.expected_result: Multiple pins can be selected by clicking on each individually, with correct highlighting

edge_reports.test_title: Map view integration with restaurant list
edge_reports.description: Validate that the map view integrates correctly with the restaurant list
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list at /restaurants
Step 2: Click on a random restaurant from the list
Step 3: Verify the selected restaurant pin appears on the map view
Step 4: Confirm the restaurant details match between the list and map views
edge_reports.expected_result: The map view correctly displays the selected restaurant's location, with matching details in both the list and map views

edge_reports.test_title: Information Link Displayed Prominently
edge_reports.description: Validate that the information link is displayed prominently and usable.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search
Step 2: Verify 'Information' link is displayed prominently on the top-right corner of the page
Step 3: Click 'Information' link and verify redirect to '/information' page
Step 4: Verify that the information link remains usable after navigating away from it
edge_reports.expected_result: The information link is displayed prominently on the top-right corner of the search page, and clicking it redirects to the '/information' page.

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid Information Link Click
edge_reports.description: Validate that clicking an invalid information link results in an error.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search
Step 2: Click 'Information' link and verify redirect to '/information' page
Step 3: Modify the URL to an invalid information link (e.g., '/invalid')
Step 4: Verify that clicking the invalid link results in a 404 error
edge_reports.expected_result: Clicking an invalid information link redirects to a 404 error page with a clear message indicating the link is not valid.

edge_reports.test_title: Information Link Displayed on Edge Cases
edge_reports.description: Validate that the information link is displayed correctly for edge cases.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search with no results
Step 2: Verify 'Information' link is still displayed prominently on the top-right corner of the page
Step 3: Click 'Information' link and verify redirect to '/information' page
Step 4: Verify that clicking the information link remains usable even when there are no search results
edge_reports.expected_result: The information link is displayed prominently on the top-right corner of the search page, regardless of whether there are search results or not.

edge_reports.test_title: Information Link Integration with Search Results
edge_reports.description: Validate that the information link integrates correctly with search results.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search with 10+ results
Step 2: Verify 'Information' link is displayed prominently on the top-right corner of the page
Step 3: Click a random search result and verify redirect to '/restaurant' page
Step 4: Verify that clicking the information link from the restaurant page redirects back to the search results
edge_reports.expected_result: The information link integrates correctly with search results, allowing users to navigate between pages seamlessly.

edge_reports.test_title: Selecting information link takes one click
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the information link only requires a single click
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list page at /restaurants
Step 2: Click on first restaurant's 'Information' link
Step 3: Verify redirect to restaurant details page at /restaurant/<actual_id>
Step 4: Confirm display of relevant information (e.g., address, phone number, hours) for the selected restaurant
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully redirected to restaurant details page with relevant information displayed

edge_reports.test_title: Invalid link selection returns error
edge_reports.description: Validate that attempting to select an invalid 'Information' link results in an error
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list page at /restaurants
Step 2: Click on non-existent or invalid 'Information' link (e.g., '/restaurant/99999')
Step 3: Verify display of error message indicating the link is invalid
Step 4: Confirm no redirect to a new page
edge_reports.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating invalid 'Information' link selection, with no redirect

edge_reports.test_title: Edge case: Selecting information link from first/last page
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the 'Information' link works correctly when on the first or last page of results
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant list page at /restaurants with sorting by distance (first page)
Step 2: Click on 'Information' link for the first/last restaurant on the page
Step 3: Verify redirect to restaurant details page at /restaurant/<actual_id>
Step 4: Confirm display of relevant information for the selected restaurant
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully redirected to restaurant details page with relevant information displayed, regardless of page position

edge_reports.test_title: Integration test: Selecting information link from search results
edge_reports.description: Validate that selecting the 'Information' link works correctly when searching for restaurants and viewing search results
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to search page at /search with query 'Italian'
Step 2: Click on first restaurant's 'Information' link from search results
Step 3: Verify redirect to restaurant details page at /restaurant/<actual_id>
Step 4: Confirm display of relevant information for the selected restaurant
edge_reports.expected_result: User successfully redirected to restaurant details page with relevant information displayed, after searching and selecting 'Information' link

edge_reports.test_title: Response Time: Search Restaurants by Distance and Price
edge_reports.description: Validate response time for searching restaurants within a specific distance and price range.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /search-restaurants page
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in cuisine field: 'Italian'
Step 3: Select '5 km' as distance and set price range from $10 to $20
Step 4: Click 'Search' button and verify response time is within 500ms
Step 5: Confirm search results display at least 5 restaurants
edge_reports.expected_result: Response time is within 500ms, displaying search results with at least 5 restaurants matching the specified distance and price range.

edge_reports.test_title: Response Time: Search Restaurants by Distance and Price with Invalid Input
edge_reports.description: Validate error handling for searching restaurants within a specific distance and price range with invalid input.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /search-restaurants page
Step 2: Enter 'InvalidCuisine' in cuisine field: 'InvalidCuisine'
Step 3: Select '5 km' as distance and set price range from $10 to $20
Step 4: Click 'Search' button and verify error message displays
Step 5: Confirm search results do not display
edge_reports.expected_result: Error message displays indicating invalid input, and no search results are displayed.

edge_reports.test_title: Response Time: Search Restaurants by Distance and Price with Maximum Results
edge_reports.description: Validate response time for searching restaurants within a specific distance and price range with maximum results.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /search-restaurants page
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in cuisine field: 'Italian'
Step 3: Select '5 km' as distance and set price range from $10 to $20
Step 4: Click 'Search' button with maximum results (100) selected
Step 5: Verify response time is within 500ms, displaying search results with at least 100 restaurants
edge_reports.expected_result: Response time is within 500ms, displaying search results with at least 100 restaurants matching the specified distance and price range.

edge_reports.test_title: Response Time: Search Restaurants by Distance and Price with Integration to Payment Gateway
edge_reports.description: Validate response time for searching restaurants within a specific distance and price range with integration to payment gateway.
preconditions: Restaurant search feature is enabled, and payment gateway integration is configured
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /search-restaurants page
Step 2: Enter 'Italian' in cuisine field: 'Italian'
Step 3: Select '5 km' as distance and set price range from $10 to $20
Step 4: Click 'Search' button and verify response time is within 500ms, displaying search results with at least 5 restaurants
Step 5: Confirm payment gateway integration is successful for selected restaurant
edge_reports.expected_result: Response time is within 500ms, displaying search results with at least 5 restaurants matching the specified distance and price range, and payment gateway integration is successful.

edge_reports.test_title: Inform user about connection loss when system is down
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system displays a notification to the user when the connection is lost
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-list page
Step 2: Simulate network disconnection
Step 3: Verify a notification message 'Connection Lost' is displayed on the page
Step 4: Confirm the notification message remains visible until connection is re-established
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays a persistent notification message 'Connection Lost' on the /restaurant-list page until the connection is re-established, allowing users to take necessary actions.

edge_reports.test_title: Error handling for invalid network status
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system handles an invalid network status correctly
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-list page
Step 2: Simulate an invalid network status (e.g., 'unknown')
Step 3: Verify a notification message 'Network Error' is displayed on the page
Step 4: Confirm the notification message remains visible until connection is re-established
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays a persistent notification message 'Network Error' on the /restaurant-list page when an invalid network status is detected, allowing users to take necessary actions.

edge_reports.test_title: Edge case: System down with no restaurants available
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system handles an edge case where there are no restaurants available when the connection is lost
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-list page
Step 2: Simulate network disconnection
Step 3: Verify a notification message 'Connection Lost' is displayed on the page
Step 4: Confirm that no restaurants are listed on the page
edge_reports.expected_result: When the system is down and there are no restaurants available, the system displays a persistent notification message 'Connection Lost' on the /restaurant-list page, indicating to users that no data is available.

edge_reports.test_title: Integration test: System dependability with other features
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system dependability feature integrates correctly with other features
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-list page
Step 2: Simulate network disconnection
Step 3: Verify a notification message 'Connection Lost' is displayed on the page
Step 4: Confirm that other features (e.g., search, filters) are not affected by the connection loss
edge_reports.expected_result: When the system is down, the system dependability feature correctly integrates with other features, ensuring that users can still interact with the system without being affected by the connection loss.

edge_reports.test_title: Inform user about strange input for price
edge_reports.description: Test that the system informs the user when entering a strange input for price
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'abc' as price range in the price field
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with price range 'abc'
Step 4: Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid input for price
Step 5: Confirm the user is not redirected to search results
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays an error message 'Invalid price range. Please enter a valid number' and does not redirect the user to search results

edge_reports.test_title: Test invalid distance input for restaurant search
edge_reports.description: Test that the system handles invalid distance input for restaurant search
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'xyz' as distance range in the distance field
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with distance range 'xyz'
Step 4: Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid input for distance
Step 5: Confirm the user is not redirected to search results
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays an error message 'Invalid distance range. Please enter a valid number' and does not redirect the user to search results

edge_reports.test_title: Test maximum distance for restaurant search
edge_reports.description: Test that the system handles maximum distance input for restaurant search
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search
Step 2: Enter '100' as distance range in the distance field
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with distance range '100'
Step 4: Verify that only restaurants within a maximum distance of 100 are displayed
Step 5: Confirm the user is redirected to search results
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays only restaurants within a maximum distance of 100 and redirects the user to search results

edge_reports.test_title: Test integration with restaurant details page
edge_reports.description: Test that the system integrates correctly with the restaurant details page
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to restaurant search page at /search
Step 2: Enter 'valid' as price range in the price field
Step 3: Click 'Search' button with price range 'valid'
Step 4: Select a restaurant from the search results and navigate to its details page
Step 5: Verify that the restaurant details page displays correct information
edge_reports.expected_result: The system correctly integrates with the restaurant details page, displaying accurate information about the selected restaurant

edge_reports.test_title: Restaurant Owner Creates Secure Account with Valid Data
edge_reports.description: Validate that a restaurant owner can create an account with valid data and receive a confirmation email.
preconditions: The system is in the correct state for creating a new account
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-owner-signup
Step 2: Enter 'example-restaurant' in the restaurant name field
Step 3: Enter 'secure-password' in the password field and confirm it
Step 4: Click 'Create Account' button
Step 5: Verify a confirmation email is sent to the registered email address
edge_reports.expected_result: The restaurant owner receives a confirmation email with a unique account ID and can log in successfully.

edge_reports.test_title: Restaurant Owner Fails to Create Secure Account with Invalid Data
edge_reports.description: Validate that a restaurant owner cannot create an account with invalid data and receive an error message.
preconditions: The system is in the correct state for creating a new account
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-owner-signup
Step 2: Enter 'invalid-restaurant' in the restaurant name field
Step 3: Enter 'weak-password' in the password field and confirm it
Step 4: Click 'Create Account' button
Step 5: Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid data
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating that the account creation failed due to invalid data.

edge_reports.test_title: Restaurant Owner Creates Secure Account with Minimum/Maximum Data
edge_reports.description: Validate that a restaurant owner can create an account with minimum and maximum allowed data.
preconditions: The system is in the correct state for creating a new account
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-owner-signup
Step 2: Enter 'minimum-restaurant' in the restaurant name field (minimum length)
Step 3: Enter 'strong-password' in the password field and confirm it (maximum length)
Step 4: Click 'Create Account' button
Step 5: Verify that the account is created successfully with minimum/maximum data
edge_reports.expected_result: The system creates an account with minimum and maximum allowed data, and the restaurant owner can log in successfully.

edge_reports.test_title: Restaurant Owner Creates Secure Account with Existing Email
edge_reports.description: Validate that a restaurant owner cannot create an account with an email address already registered.
preconditions: An existing restaurant owner has an account with the system
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurant-owner-signup
Step 2: Enter 'existing-restaurant' in the restaurant name field
Step 3: Enter 'unique-password' in the password field and confirm it
Step 4: Click 'Create Account' button
Step 5: Verify an error message is displayed indicating that the email address is already registered
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating that the email address is already registered, and the account creation fails.

edge_reports.test_title: System Reliability: Displaying Restaurant List with Distance and Price
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system displays a list of restaurants within a specific distance and price range.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurants page
Step 2: Enter 'distance' filter with value '5 km'
Step 3: Select 'price' filter with minimum value '20' and maximum value '50'
Step 4: Verify the list displays at most 100 restaurants within the specified distance and price range
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays a list of up to 100 restaurants within 5 km, with prices ranging from $20 to $50.

edge_reports.test_title: System Reliability: Invalid Distance Filter
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system handles an invalid distance filter value.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurants page
Step 2: Enter 'distance' filter with value 'invalid'
Step 3: Verify an error message is displayed indicating the invalid input
Step 4: Confirm the system does not display any restaurants
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays an error message and does not display any restaurants when an invalid distance filter value is entered.

edge_reports.test_title: System Reliability: Displaying Maximum Number of Restaurants
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system displays the maximum number of restaurants (100) when the distance and price filters are not applied.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /restaurants page
Step 2: Verify the list displays at most 100 restaurants without any filters applied
Step 3: Confirm the system does not display more than 100 restaurants
Step 4: Verify the system does not display less than 100 restaurants
edge_reports.expected_result: The system displays at most 100 restaurants without any filters applied, and does not display more or fewer results.

edge_reports.test_title: System Reliability: Integration with Search Feature
edge_reports.description: Validate that the system integrates correctly with the search feature when searching for restaurants within a specific distance and price range.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to /search page
Step 2: Enter 'search query' in search field
Step 3: Select 'distance' filter with value '5 km'
Step 4: Verify the list displays at most 100 restaurants within the specified distance and price range
edge_reports.expected_result: The system integrates correctly with the search feature, displaying at most 100 restaurants within the specified distance and price range when searching for specific restaurants.

edge_reports.test_title: Mobile App Download Performance Test: Initial Load
edge_reports.description: Verifies that the mobile app can be downloaded and initialized within a reasonable time frame.
test_steps: Step 1: Open the app store on the device and search for the restaurant/food service mobile app
Step 2: Select the app from the search results and initiate the download process
Step 3: Monitor the download progress until completion (approx. 5-10 seconds)
Step 4: Verify that the app icon appears on the device's home screen within 1 second of installation completion
Step 5: Launch the app to verify that it initializes and displays the main menu within 2 seconds
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile app can be downloaded and initialized within 15 seconds, with a maximum of 5 seconds spent on the download process.

edge_reports.test_title: Mobile App Download Performance Test: Repeated Downloads
edge_reports.description: Verifies that the mobile app can be downloaded multiple times without significant performance degradation.
test_steps: Step 1: Open the app store on the device and search for the restaurant/food service mobile app
Step 2: Select the app from the search results and initiate the download process (repeat this step 5 times)
Step 3: Monitor the download progress until completion (approx. 5-10 seconds per download)
Step 4: Verify that the app icon appears on the device's home screen within 1 second of installation completion for each download
Step 5: Launch the app to verify that it initializes and displays the main menu within 2 seconds after the final download
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile app can be downloaded and initialized multiple times without significant performance degradation, with a maximum of 10 seconds spent on the download process for each subsequent download.

edge_reports.test_title: Mobile App Download Performance Test: Network Conditions
edge_reports.description: Verifies that the mobile app can be downloaded and initialized under various network conditions.
test_steps: Step 1: Open the app store on the device and search for the restaurant/food service mobile app
Step 2: Initiate a download of the app while simulating poor network conditions (e.g., slow internet, high latency)
Step 3: Monitor the download progress until completion (approx. 10-20 seconds)
Step 4: Verify that the app icon appears on the device's home screen within 2 seconds of installation completion
Step 5: Launch the app to verify that it initializes and displays the main menu within 3 seconds
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile app can be downloaded and initialized under various network conditions, with a maximum of 20 seconds spent on the download process in poor network conditions.

edge_reports.test_title: Unauthorized Download Attempt
edge_reports.description: Validate that an unauthorized user cannot download the mobile application.
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the app store page without logging in
Step 2: Click on the 'Download' button
Step 3: Verify that a login prompt appears instead of allowing download
Step 4: Attempt to bypass login by using invalid credentials
Step 5: Verify that the download is still not allowed and an error message is displayed
edge_reports.expected_result: The user is prompted to log in before downloading the app, and attempting to bypass login results in an error message.

edge_reports.test_title: Data Tampering During Download
edge_reports.description: Validate that the downloaded mobile application is not tampered with during the download process.
test_steps: Step 1: Log in to the app store page
Step 2: Click on the 'Download' button
Step 3: Use a tool like Wireshark or Burp Suite to intercept and modify the download request
Step 4: Verify that the modified request is rejected by the server
Step 5: Download the app again without tampering with the request
edge_reports.expected_result: The downloaded app is not modified during the download process, and any attempts to tamper with the request are rejected.

edge_reports.test_title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
edge_reports.description: Validate that the download page is not vulnerable to cross-site scripting attacks.
test_steps: Step 1: Log in to the app store page
Step 2: Enter a malicious script in the search bar or other input field
Step 3: Verify that the script is executed and displays an alert box
Step 4: Attempt to execute the script again after closing the alert box
Step 5: Verify that the script is not executed again

edge_reports.test_title: API Test: Download Mobile Application
edge_reports.description: Verifies that the mobile application can be downloaded successfully.

Step 3: Verify response body contains the mobile application download link
Step 4: Extract the download link from the response body and store it as a variable
Step 5: Send GET request to the extracted download link with header Accept: application/octet-stream
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile application is successfully downloaded and the download link is valid.

edge_reports.test_title: API Test: Verify Mobile Application Download Link

edge_reports.test_title: API Test: Verify Mobile Application Download Time

Step 4: Measure the time taken to download the mobile application using the extracted download link

edge_reports.test_title: Download Application Data Integrity - CRUD Operations Validation
edge_reports.description: Validate that CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) on downloaded application data are correctly executed and persisted.
preconditions: Application is installed and logged in
test_steps: Step 1: Create a new restaurant profile with name 'Test Restaurant' and address '123 Main St'. Verify that the profile is successfully created and stored in the app's database.
Step 2: Read the newly created restaurant profile to verify its existence and details (name, address).
Step 3: Update the restaurant profile by changing its name to 'Test Restaurant Updated'. Verify that the update is persisted and reflected in the app's database.
Step 4: Delete the updated restaurant profile. Verify that it is successfully deleted from the app's database.
Step 5: Attempt to read the deleted restaurant profile to verify that it no longer exists.
edge_reports.expected_result: All CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) are correctly executed and persisted in the app's database. No errors or inconsistencies are detected.

edge_reports.test_title: Download Application Data Integrity - Calculation Accuracy and Mandatory Field Validation
edge_reports.description: Validate that calculations and mandatory field validation are correctly executed on downloaded application data.
preconditions: Application is installed and logged in
test_steps: Step 1: Create a new menu item with price $10.00 and calculate the total cost of the menu item, including tax (assuming 8% tax rate). Verify that the calculated total cost matches the expected value.
Step 2: Attempt to create another menu item without specifying a price. Verify that an error message is displayed indicating that the price field is mandatory.
Step 3: Update the first menu item's price to $12.00 and recalculate the total cost, including tax. Verify that the updated total cost matches the expected value.
edge_reports.expected_result: Calculations are accurate, and mandatory field validation is correctly executed on downloaded application data. No errors or inconsistencies are detected.

edge_reports.test_title: Download Application Data Integrity - Foreign Key Relationships and Transaction Integrity
edge_reports.description: Validate that foreign key relationships and transaction integrity are correctly executed on downloaded application data.
preconditions: Application is installed and logged in
test_steps: Step 1: Create a new restaurant profile with name 'Test Restaurant' and address '123 Main St'. Verify that the profile is successfully created and stored in the app's database.
Step 2: Attempt to create a new menu item without specifying a parent restaurant. Verify that an error message is displayed indicating that the parent restaurant field is mandatory.
Step 3: Update the first restaurant profile by changing its name to 'Test Restaurant Updated'. Verify that the update is persisted and reflected in the app's database.
edge_reports.expected_result: Foreign key relationships are correctly executed, and transaction integrity is maintained on downloaded application data. No errors or inconsistencies are detected.

edge_reports.test_title: Network Interruption Handling: App Crash Recovery
edge_reports.description: Validate that the app recovers from a network interruption and resumes normal functionality.
preconditions: App is installed on a device with stable internet connection
test_steps: Step 1: Simulate network interruption using a proxy or emulator
Step 2: Verify app crashes or freezes due to the network loss
Step 3: Restore network connectivity and wait for 10 seconds
Step 4: Verify app recovers from crash and resumes normal functionality (e.g., menu, search bar)
Step 5: Perform a specific action (e.g., search for restaurants) to verify app's responsiveness
edge_reports.expected_result: The app recovers from crash and resumes normal functionality within 10 seconds, allowing the user to perform specific actions (e.g., search for restaurants) without issues.

edge_reports.test_title: GPS Signal Loss Behavior: App Crash Recovery
edge_reports.description: Validate that the app recovers from a GPS signal loss and resumes normal functionality.
preconditions: App is installed on a device with GPS enabled
test_steps: Step 1: Simulate GPS signal loss using a GPS emulator or mock location
Step 2: Verify app crashes or freezes due to the GPS signal loss
Step 3: Restore GPS signal and wait for 10 seconds
Step 4: Verify app recovers from crash and resumes normal functionality (e.g., menu, search bar)
Step 5: Perform a specific action (e.g., search for restaurants near me) to verify app's responsiveness
edge_reports.expected_result: The app recovers from crash and resumes normal functionality within 10 seconds, allowing the user to perform specific actions (e.g., search for restaurants near me) without issues.

test_data.actual_field1: GPS signal loss simulated using emulator
test_data.actual_field2: App crashed/froze during GPS signal loss

edge_reports.test_title: Session Timeout Handling: Data Persistence Across Crashes

Step 5: Perform a specific action (e.g., search for restaurants) to verify app's responsiveness

edge_reports.description: Validate that the sorting and filtering options in the switch result view are intuitive and easy to use.

test_steps: Step 1: Open the mobile application and navigate to the switch result view page.

Step 6: Verify that the sorting and filtering options are persisted across different views (i.e., if a user sorts by rating, it remains sorted when switching to map view).
edge_reports.expected_result: The sorting and filtering options in the switch result view are intuitive and easy to use, allowing users to quickly find relevant results.

edge_reports.test_title: Switch Result View: Error Handling
edge_reports.description: Validate that the switch result view handles errors and unexpected situations in a user-friendly manner.

test_steps: Step 1: Open the mobile application and navigate to the switch result view page.
Step 2: Simulate an error condition (e.g., network connectivity issue or server-side error) that would typically occur when switching between views.
Step 3: Verify that the page displays a clear and concise error message indicating the issue (e.g., 'Error loading results. Please try again.')
Step 4: Check that the user can retry the action without any issues or errors.
Step 5: Confirm that the error message is displayed for a reasonable amount of time before disappearing (e.g., 3-5 seconds).
Step 6: Verify that the page returns to its normal state once the issue is resolved.
edge_reports.expected_result: The switch result view handles errors and unexpected situations in a user-friendly manner, displaying clear error messages and allowing users to retry actions.

edge_reports.test_title: Get Switch Result View
edge_reports.description: Validate that the switch result view is returned correctly when switching between different views
preconditions: User has logged in and is on the main menu
test_steps: Step 1: Send GET request to /api/switch-result-view with header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>
Step 2: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned
Step 3: Verify response body contains the switch result view with correct data (e.g., restaurant name, rating)
Step 4: Verify that the response includes a 'next' link to the next page of results
Step 5: Verify that the response does not include more than 10 results
edge_reports.expected_result: The API returns a JSON object with the switch result view, including the correct restaurant name and rating, within 2 seconds.

edge_reports.test_title: Get Switch Result View with Pagination

preconditions: User has logged in and is on the main menu
test_steps: Step 1: Send GET request to /api/switch-result-view?page=1 with header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>
Step 2: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned
Step 3: Verify response body contains the switch result view with correct data (e.g., restaurant name, rating) for page 1
Step 4: Send GET request to /api/switch-result-view?page=2 with header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>
Step 5: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned and response body contains the switch result view with correct data (e.g., restaurant name, rating) for page 2
edge_reports.expected_result: The API returns a JSON object with the switch result view, including the correct restaurant name and rating, for each page of results, within 2 seconds.

edge_reports.test_title: Get Switch Result View with Sorting

Step 3: Verify response body contains the switch result view with correct data (e.g., restaurant name, rating) sorted by rating
Step 4: Send GET request to /api/switch-result-view?sort=name with header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>
Step 5: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned and response body contains the switch result view with correct data (e.g., restaurant name, rating) sorted by name
edge_reports.expected_result: The API returns a JSON object with the switch result view, including the correct restaurant name and rating, sorted by either rating or name, within 2 seconds.

edge_reports.test_title: Test CRUD Operations: Create and Retrieve Results

edge_reports.test_title: Test Calculation Accuracy: Rating Calculation

edge_reports.test_title: Test Data Type Constraints: Review Length

edge_reports.test_title: Network Interruption Handling: App Crash Recovery
edge_reports.description: Validate that the app recovers from a network interruption and displays the previous switch result view without data loss.
preconditions: App is installed on a device with stable internet connection
test_steps: Step 1: Launch the app and navigate to the switch result view
Step 2: Simulate a network interruption using a tool like Charles Proxy or Fiddler
Step 3: Verify that the app crashes and displays an error message
Step 4: Restart the app and verify that it recovers from the crash
Step 5: Check that the switch result view is displayed with no data loss
edge_reports.expected_result: The app recovers from the network interruption and displays the previous switch result view without data loss, as indicated by the absence of any data loss or corruption.

edge_reports.test_title: GPS Signal Loss Behavior: App Crash Recovery
edge_reports.description: Validate that the app recovers from a GPS signal loss and displays the previous switch result view without data loss.

test_steps: Step 1: Launch the app and navigate to the switch result view
Step 2: Simulate a GPS signal loss using a tool like FakeGPS or Gpsdroid
Step 3: Verify that the app crashes and displays an error message
Step 4: Restart the app and verify that it recovers from the crash
Step 5: Check that the switch result view is displayed with no data loss
edge_reports.expected_result: The app recovers from the GPS signal loss and displays the previous switch result view without data loss, as indicated by the absence of any data loss or corruption.

edge_reports.test_title: Session Timeout Handling: Data Persistence Across Crashes

Step 3: Verify that the app crashes and displays an error message
Step 4: Restart the app and verify that it recovers from the crash
Step 5: Check that the switch result view is displayed with no data loss
edge_reports.expected_result: The app persists data across crashes when a session times out, as indicated by the absence of any data loss or corruption.

edge_reports.test_title: Test Case: Information Link Selection - Authentication Bypass

Step 6: Verify that the system still redirects the user to the login screen or displays an error message indicating unauthorized access
edge_reports.expected_result: The system redirects the unauthenticated user to the login screen or displays an error message, and only allows authenticated users to access sensitive information links.

Step 6: Verify that the system consistently prevents XSS attacks
edge_reports.expected_result: The mobile app prevents XSS attacks when selecting information links and does not execute malicious scripts.

edge_reports.test_title: API Test: Information Link Selection
edge_reports.description: Verifies that selecting an information link returns the correct data

Step 2: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned
Step 3: Verify response body contains a list of information links with their corresponding IDs and titles
Step 4: Select the first information link from the response body
Step 5: Send GET request to /api/information-link/<selected_link_id> with header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>
Step 6: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned and the selected information link data is present in the response body
edge_reports.expected_result: The API returns a list of information links with their corresponding IDs and titles, and selecting an information link returns the correct data

Step 2: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned and a list of information links is present in the response body
Step 3: Filter the information links by title using the 'title' parameter (e.g., ?title=Restaurant)
Step 4: Send GET request to /api/information-links with the filtered parameters and header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>
Step 5: Verify HTTP 200 status code returned and the filtered list of information links is present in the response body

edge_reports.expected_result: The API returns a filtered list of information links based on title or ID, and the filter is applied correctly

Step 3: Sort the information links by title using the 'sort' parameter (e.g., ?sort=title)
Step 4: Send GET request to /api/information-links with the sorted parameters and header Authorization: Bearer <valid_jwt_token>

edge_reports.expected_result: The API returns a sorted list of information links based on title or ID, and the sort is applied correctly

edge_reports.test_title: Network Interruption Handling: Search Results Disappear

Step 4: Observe that search results disappear and an error message is displayed
Step 5: Re-establish network connection and verify that search results reappear when query is re-executed
edge_reports.expected_result: Search results disappear, and an error message indicating 'Network Connection Lost' is displayed. Upon re-establishing the network connection, the search results reappear with the original query.

edge_reports.test_title: GPS Signal Loss Behavior: Search Results Update

Step 5: Re-establish GPS connection and verify that search results reappear with the original query
edge_reports.expected_result: Search results update correctly when GPS signal is lost, displaying a message indicating 'No nearby restaurants found'. Upon re-establishing the GPS connection, the search results reappear with the original query.

edge_reports.test_title: Search by Restaurant Type: SQL Injection
edge_reports.description: Validate that the search functionality does not allow SQL injection attacks when searching by restaurant type.
preconditions: The mobile app is installed and launched
test_steps: Step 1: Launch the mobile app and navigate to the search page
Step 2: Enter a malicious input in the 'Restaurant Type' field, such as ' OR 1=1 --'
Step 3: Verify that the search results are returned without any errors or exceptions
Step 4: Inspect the network traffic using a tool like Burp Suite to verify that the injected SQL is not executed
Step 5: Repeat steps 2-4 with different malicious inputs, such as ' OR 1=2 --' and ' OR 1=3 --'
Step 6: Verify that the search results are still returned without any errors or exceptions
edge_reports.expected_result: The search results are returned without any errors or exceptions, and the injected SQL is not executed.

preconditions: The mobile app is installed and launched
test_steps: Step 1: Launch the mobile app and navigate to the search page
Step 2: Enter a malicious input in the 'Restaurant Type' field, such as '<script>alert('XSS')</script>'
Step 3: Verify that the search results are returned without any errors or exceptions
Step 4: Inspect the HTML source code of the search results page to verify that the injected script is not executed
Step 5: Repeat steps 2-4 with different malicious inputs, such as '<script>alert('XSS')</script>' and '<script>alert('XSS')</script>'
Step 6: Verify that the search results are still returned without any errors or exceptions
edge_reports.expected_result: The search results are returned without any errors or exceptions, and the injected script is not executed.

edge_reports.test_title: Search by Restaurant Type: Authentication Bypass

Step 2: Enter a specific dish name in the search field and initiate the search

edge_reports.test_title: Search Restaurant Menu by Keyword (100 results)

edge_reports.test_title: Filtering Search Results by Cuisine (50 results)

edge_reports.test_title: Search Restaurant Reviews by Keyword (20 results)

Step 3: Wait for search results to load (max 1 second)
